title: Supervillain HOA Complaint
text:
## Supervillain HOA Complaint

Dear {person}, the board has received {number} complaints about your {adjective} lair.

Neighbors report a {color} laser, loose {plural noun}, and a {animal} {verb ending in -ing} on the roof.

Per community rules, residents may not {verb} the moon before {day of week} or store {food} in the shared {place}.

Please remove the giant {object} and repaint the front {noun} a less {adjective} color.

Failure to comply will make us {emotion} and summon a {job} with a {body part} clipboard and {number} forms.
